creator: iron.udjin@gmail.com
text:
After 10 hours uptime I have 3 looping connection which produce 30Mibt/s of traffic. I cannot say exact time when they started looping because traffic graph has quite linear grow: https://prnt.sc/xv6ldt

netstat -m:

265055/26920/291975 mbufs in use (current/cache/total)
130635K/124086K/254721K bytes allocated to network (current/cache/total)

# sysctl net.inet.tcp.functions_available net.inet.tcp.rack
net.inet.tcp.functions_available:

freebsd                           freebsd                          3
rack                            * rack                             4107
